mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_material ( title, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{documentType}, #{source}, #{status}, #{parser}, #{documentSummary}, #{chunkCount}, #{originalFilename}, #{originalFilePath} )
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_material SET status = #{status}, parser = #{parser}, document_summary = #{documentSummary}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE learning_material SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_material ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, title, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_material WHERE id = #{id}
